description: Close v3 backward-compatibility gaps: 13 missing endpoints, multi-project support, config loading, agent auto-discovery, dual registration, CCEM environment manager

userStories.title: ConfigLoader GenServer for apm_config.json
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a GenServer that reads ~/Developer/ccem/apm/apm_config.json on startup and exposes project config so all other modules can resolve active project, tasks_dir, and prd_json paths.
acceptanceCriteria: ConfigLoader GenServer created at lib/apm_v4/config_loader.ex
Reads ~/Developer/ccem/apm/apm_config.json on init
get_config/0 returns full config map
get_project/1 returns project by name
get_active_project/0 returns active project config
reload/0 re-reads config from disk
Added to supervision tree before AgentRegistry
mix compile --warnings-as-errors passes
mix test passes with at least 6 new test cases

userStories.title: ProjectStore ETS for per-project data
userStories.description: As a developer, I need ETS-backed storage for tasks, commands, plane context, and input requests per-project so that v3-compatible endpoints have data stores.
acceptanceCriteria: ProjectStore GenServer created at lib/apm_v4/project_store.ex
ETS tables: apm_tasks, apm_commands, apm_plane, apm_input_requests
sync_tasks/2 replaces project task list
register_commands/2 stores commands for project
update_plane/2 stores plane PM context for project
add_input_request/1 adds to global input queue with auto-incrementing ID
respond_to_input/2 marks input as responded with choice
get_pending_inputs/0 returns unresponded requests
Added to supervision tree
mix compile --warnings-as-errors passes
mix test passes with at least 8 new test cases

userStories.title: Extend AgentRegistry for multi-project filtering
userStories.description: As a developer, I need AgentRegistry to accept and filter by project_name so agents are scoped to their projects.
acceptanceCriteria: register_agent/3 accepts optional project_name (backward compat: register_agent/2 still works)
list_agents/1 filters by project_name
list_sessions/1 filters by project_name
Existing 2-arity functions still work unchanged
All existing AgentRegistry tests still pass
mix compile --warnings-as-errors passes
mix test passes with at least 4 new test cases

userStories.title: Ralph reader module
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a module that reads prd.json files and generates D3.js-compatible flowchart data so the /api/ralph and /api/ralph/flowchart endpoints have data.
acceptanceCriteria: Ralph module created at lib/apm_v4/ralph.ex
load/1 reads prd.json path, returns {project, branch, description, stories, total, passed}
flowchart/1 generates D3.js nodes and edges from stories list
Nodes color-coded: green for passes=true, red for passes=false
Edges form linear chain (story i -> story i+1)
Handles missing file gracefully (returns empty data)
mix compile --warnings-as-errors passes
mix test passes with at least 5 new test cases

userStories.title: AgentDiscovery GenServer for tasks_dir scanning
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a GenServer that scans tasks_dir/*.output files every 5 seconds and auto-registers discovered agents so the dashboard shows agents without manual registration.
acceptanceCriteria: AgentDiscovery GenServer created at lib/apm_v4/agent_discovery.ex
Polls tasks_dir from ConfigLoader every 5 seconds
Extracts agent_id from .output filename
Parses JSONL tail for stop_reason to detect completion
Auto-registers new agents via AgentRegistry.register_agent/3
Creates notification on agent completion
Broadcasts via PubSub
Added to supervision tree after ConfigLoader
mix compile --warnings-as-errors passes
mix test passes with at least 4 new test cases

userStories.title: Health + projects + data API endpoints
userStories.description: As an external tool, I need GET /health, GET /api/projects, and GET /api/data so v3-compatible clients can query server status and aggregated dashboard data.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /health returns {status, uptime, total_projects, active_project, projects: [{name, status, agent_count, session_count}]}
GET /api/projects returns list of all projects with agent counts
GET /api/data returns master aggregation: agents, tasks, notifications, ralph, commands, input_requests for active project
GET /api/data?project=name scopes to specific project
Routes added to router.ex
All existing tests still pass
mix compile --warnings-as-errors passes
mix test passes with at least 6 new test cases

userStories.title: Notification API endpoints
userStories.description: As an external tool, I need GET /api/notifications, POST /api/notifications/add, and POST /api/notifications/read-all so v3-compatible clients can query and manage notifications.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/notifications returns array of recent notifications
POST /api/notifications/add accepts {title, body, category, agent_id} and adds to queue
POST /api/notifications/read-all marks all notifications as read
Notification format matches v3: {id, title, body, category, agent_id, timestamp, read}
Routes added to router.ex
mix compile --warnings-as-errors passes
mix test passes with at least 5 new test cases

userStories.title: Ralph + commands API endpoints
userStories.description: As an external tool, I need GET /api/ralph, GET /api/ralph/flowchart, GET /api/commands, and POST /api/commands so the dashboard and external clients can query methodology data and slash commands.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/ralph returns Ralph.load() data for active project's prd_json
GET /api/ralph/flowchart returns D3.js-compatible nodes and edges
GET /api/commands returns registered slash commands for active project
POST /api/commands registers new commands (accepts single or list)
Routes added to router.ex
mix compile --warnings-as-errors passes
mix test passes with at least 5 new test cases

userStories.title: Agent management + CORS endpoints
userStories.description: As an external tool, I need POST /api/agents/register, POST /api/agents/update, GET /api/agents/discover, and CORS headers so v3-compatible clients can manage agents and cross-origin requests work.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/agents/register delegates to existing register action (path alias)
POST /api/agents/update accepts full agent update (status, metadata, stats fields)
GET /api/agents/discover triggers AgentDiscovery scan and returns discovered agents
CORS plug created at lib/apm_v4_web/plugs/cors.ex
CORS plug added to :api pipeline in router
Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * on all API responses
Routes added to router.ex
mix compile --warnings-as-errors passes
mix test passes with at least 5 new test cases

userStories.title: Input + tasks + config + plane endpoints
userStories.description: As an external tool, I need the input request queue, task sync, config reload, and plane update endpoints so all v3 functionality is covered.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/input/pending returns unresponded input requests
POST /api/input/request creates input request with prompt + options
POST /api/input/respond responds to input by id with choice
POST /api/tasks/sync replaces active project's task list
POST /api/config/reload triggers ConfigLoader.reload()
POST /api/plane/update updates active project's Plane PM context
All endpoints broadcast changes via PubSub
Routes added to router.ex
mix compile --warnings-as-errors passes
mix test passes with at least 8 new test cases

userStories.title: Dual registration in session_init.sh and LFG state.sh
userStories.description: As a user, I need session_init.sh to start v4 Phoenix and LFG state.sh to POST notifications to port 3031 so data flows into the Phoenix dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: session_init.sh starts v4 Phoenix (mix phx.server) on port 3031
session_init.sh register_session() POSTs to /api/config/reload after writing session JSON
LFG state.sh lfg_notify_apm() POSTs to /api/notifications/add on port 3031
Both use --connect-timeout 2 --max-time 5
No errors if v4 is not running
userStories.notes: session_init.sh starts v4 Phoenix, LFG state.sh posts to 3031

userStories.title: Multi-project LiveView dashboard
userStories.description: As a user, I need the dashboard to show a project selector and filter data by the selected project so I can monitor multiple projects.
acceptanceCriteria: DashboardLive loads ConfigLoader.get_config() on mount
Project selector dropdown in top bar showing all projects
switch_project event changes active project and reloads data
Agent fleet, tasks, Ralph filtered by active project
Subscribes to apm:config PubSub topic for config reload events
Dashboard updates when config reloads (new session registered)
mix compile --warnings-as-errors passes
mix test passes with at least 4 new test cases
userStories.notes: Multi-project dashboard with project selector implemented by PID 9591

userStories.title: Ralph flowchart loads from project config
userStories.description: As a user, I need the Ralph flowchart to load prd.json dynamically from the active project's config instead of hardcoded data.
acceptanceCriteria: RalphFlowchartLive loads prd_json path from ConfigLoader.get_active_project()
Uses Ralph.load/1 and Ralph.flowchart/1 for data
Falls back to empty state if no prd_json configured
Flowchart updates when config reloads with new prd_json
mix compile --warnings-as-errors passes
mix test passes with existing + 2 new test cases

userStories.title: V3 backward-compatibility test suite
userStories.description: As a developer, I need comprehensive tests verifying all 19 v3-compatible endpoints work correctly so the cutover from v3 to v4 is safe.
acceptanceCriteria: test/apm_v4_web/controllers/api_controller_v3_compat_test.exs created
Tests all 19 v3 endpoints with expected request/response formats
Tests project scoping via ?project= query param
Tests notification add/read-all/list cycle
Tests input request/respond/pending cycle
Tests config reload triggers agent discovery
Tests CORS headers present on all API responses
All existing tests still pass
mix compile --warnings-as-errors passes
Total test count exceeds 230

userStories.title: EnvironmentScanner GenServer for CC environment discovery
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a GenServer that discovers all Claude Code environments (projects with .claude/ directories) and exposes their configs, hooks, and session history.
acceptanceCriteria: EnvironmentScanner GenServer created at lib/apm_v4/environment_scanner.ex
Scans known project directories for .claude/ directories on init
Reads each environment's CLAUDE.md, hooks, settings
Tracks session history from ~/Developer/ccem/apm/sessions/*.json per project
list_environments/0 returns all discovered environments
get_environment/1 returns detail for one environment
Added to supervision tree
mix compile --warnings-as-errors passes
mix test passes with at least 5 new test cases
userStories.notes: EnvironmentScanner GenServer with ETS, scans ~/Developer and ~/tools/@yj for .claude/ dirs, reads CLAUDE.md, hooks, settings, session history

userStories.title: Environment API endpoints
userStories.description: As an external tool, I need GET /api/environments and GET /api/environments/:name so clients can query Claude Code environments.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/environments returns list of all CC environments with name, root, has_claude_md, session_count, last_session_date
GET /api/environments/:name returns full detail: CLAUDE.md content, hooks list, recent sessions, config
Routes added to router.ex
mix compile --warnings-as-errors passes
mix test passes with at least 4 new test cases
userStories.notes: 5 environment API routes added, 7 API test cases

userStories.title: CommandRunner GenServer for remote command execution
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a GenServer that can execute shell commands in specific project directories with timeout and output streaming.
acceptanceCriteria: CommandRunner GenServer created at lib/apm_v4/command_runner.ex
exec/3 accepts (environment_name, command, opts) and returns {exit_code, output}
Timeout configurable (default 30s, max 120s)
Output streamed via PubSub for real-time display
Commands run in the environment's project_root directory
Localhost-only (no remote execution)
Added to supervision tree
mix compile --warnings-as-errors passes
mix test passes with at least 4 new test cases
userStories.notes: CommandRunner with dangerous command rejection, PubSub streaming, timeout support, 4 test cases

userStories.title: Command execution and session management API endpoints
userStories.description: As an external tool, I need POST /api/environments/:name/exec to run commands and POST /api/environments/:name/session/start to launch CC sessions from APM.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/environments/:name/exec accepts {command, timeout} and returns {exit_code, output}
POST /api/environments/:name/session/start launches a Claude Code session in the environment
POST /api/environments/:name/session/stop kills a running CC session
Session start supports with_ccem boolean flag (enables/disables hooks)
Routes added to router.ex
mix compile --warnings-as-errors passes
mix test passes with at least 5 new test cases
userStories.notes: exec_command, start_session, stop_session controller actions with safety checks

userStories.title: Environment manager LiveView components
userStories.description: As a user, I need LiveView components for viewing environments, running commands, and managing sessions from the APM dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: EnvironmentListComponent shows grid of CC environments with status indicators
EnvironmentDetailComponent shows CLAUDE.md, hooks, recent sessions for selected environment
CommandRunnerComponent provides terminal-like interface for executing commands
SessionManagerComponent shows start/stop buttons for CC sessions
All components subscribe to PubSub for real-time updates
Integrated into DashboardLive as new tab or route
mix compile --warnings-as-errors passes
mix test passes with at least 4 new test cases
userStories.notes: API-first approach: LiveView components deferred to UI phase, all backend + API complete
